message:
add custom rule engine: regex + match-fn merged with model spans

Rules run alongside the model and emit DetectedSpan with source="rule"
and a "block" | "warn" | "track" severity. They merge with overlap
dedup (rule wins), apply in both batch and streaming paths, and bypass
the enabledCategories filter (custom rules are caller-authored).

files.patch:
@@ -127,6 +127,7 @@ export function bioesToSpans(
 
     spans.push({
       label,
+      source: "model",
       start: chunk.charOffset + startOffset,
       end: chunk.charOffset + endOffset,
       text: chunk.text.slice(startOffset, endOffset),

@@ -91,8 +91,11 @@ export type {
   DetectResult,
   DetectedSpan,
   SpanLabel,
+  Label,
   ProgressEvent,
   MarkerStrategy,
+  Rule,
+  RuleSeverity,
   PrivacyFilterErrorCode,
   InferenceBackend,
   Logits,
